LAW AND MOTION, 302, THE COURT DENIES DEFENDANT WILMA BATISTE'S MOTION TO DISMISS. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO FILE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT NO LATER THAN NOVEMBER 8, 2013. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185 (302)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR DEFENDANT WILMA BATISTE'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT HEARING SET FOR JAN-30-2014 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT WILMA BATISTE'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT, AND CANNOT, CURE FACT THAT ERNEST BATISTE JR. "LIVING TRUST" HAS NO CAPACITY TO SUE. (WEIL & BROWN, CAL. PRAC. GUIDE CIV. PRO. BEFORE TRIAL CH. 2-B; SEE ALSO GALDJIE V. DARWISH (2003) 113 CAL.APP.4TH 1331, 1344.)) DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER IS TIMELY AS IT WAS FILED 35 CALENDAR DAYS AFTER PLAINTIFF WAS SERVED BY MAIL ON NOVEMBER 4, 2013. (SEE CCP 586(A)(1); CCP 1005(B).) ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR5976

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT WILMA BATISTE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO JULY 26, 2013 TO GIVE PLAINTIFF THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. PLAINTIFF MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN JULY 2, 2013 AT 4:00 PM OR THE DEMURRER WILL BE SUSTAINED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING AND REPLY PAPERS. JUDGE: RICHARD KRAMER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-03-2014 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-06-2014 Continued To Jul-23-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-03-2014 Continued To May-21-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Defendant Wilma Batiste'S Demurrer To 1st Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jan-30-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: CURTIS OLER, ESQ., 415.346.8015, FOR DEFENDANT WILMA BATISTE; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendant Wilma Batiste's Demurrer To 1st Amended Complaint is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff has not, and cannot, cure fact that Ernest Batiste Jr. "Living Trust" has no capacity to sue. (Weil & Brown, Cal. Prac. Guide Civ. Pro. Before Trial Ch. 2-B; see also Galdjie v. Darwish (2003) 113 Cal.App.4th 1331, 1344.)) Defendant's demurrer is timely as it was filed 35 calendar days after Plaintiff was served by mail on November 4, 2013. (See CCP 586(a)(1); CCP 1005(b).) Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR5976

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-14-2014 Continued To Mar-19-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-28-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT WILMA BATISTE'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is continued to January 30, 2014, on the Court's motion. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =(302/EHG)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-08-2013 Continued To Nov-27-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO DISMISS
Off Calendar Oct-17-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: CURTIS OLER, ESQ., 415.346.8238, FOR DEFENDANT WILMA BATISTE; No other appearances.

RULING: MATTER DISCUSSED. AT CONCLUSION OF DISCUSSION, THE COURT DENIES DEFENDANT WILMA BATISTE's MOTION TO DISMISS. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO FILE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT NO LATER THAN NOVEMBER 8, 2013. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-06-2013 Continued To Oct-23-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-26-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT WILMA BATISTE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with 20 days leave to amend on the ground that Plaintiff "Ernest Batiste Jr. 'Living Trust'" does not have capacity to sue. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-02-2013 Continued To Jul-26-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT WILMA BATISTE's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to July 26, 2013 to give Plaintiff the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Plaintiff must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than July 2, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the demurrer will be sustained. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the moving and reply papers. Judge: Richard Kramer, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/RAK)
